HomePage.title: Product Catalog with Next.js App Router
HomePage.description: This training project demonstrates how to build a modern product catalog using the Next.js App Router. It focuses on nested layouts, dynamic routing, loading states, error boundaries, custom not-found pages, and reusable UI components following production-ready best practices.
HomePage.exploreDesc: Browse the products list, navigate to dynamic product details pages, and experience loading skeletons, route-level error handling, and responsive layouts powered by the App Router.

features.title: Task Objectives
features.feat1_desc: Build a dedicated layout for the products section to provide a consistent user experience across all nested routes.
features.feat2_desc: Implement route-level loading states, reusable skeleton components, error boundaries, and custom not-found pages.
features.feat3_desc: Create dynamic product pages using route parameters while handling invalid or missing products gracefully.
